loop1.title: PQ Issues KPI Strip (Total Issues / I-THD Events / V-THD Events / PF Gap Feeders / Neutral Stress / Worst I-THD / Worst V-THD)
loop1.note: Showing aggregate power quality event counts and worst-case THD deviations derived from the shared context buffer; specific harmonic event counts are approximated via AI summary as direct event counters are not exposed in the live frame.

loop1.title: Signature
loop1.note: Showing per-phase THD (R/Y/B) and current unbalance as proxies for K-Factor, as specific harmonic order (H3/H5/H7) and K-Factor columns are not directly measured for this asset.
